content_body: Dear Cabin Owners, thank you so much for opening the doors to your beautiful cabin. We have enjoyed every minute of our stay. The lake is stunning and the Bigfoot musem was so cool! We finished our trip with dinner at Harvest on Main, and it couldn't have been better! This was our first visit to Georgia but definitely will not be our last! Until next time, thank you again!
title: Enjoyed Every Minute!
